arabic_REF: إِنِّي تَارِكٌ فِيكُمُ الثَّقَلَيْنِ: كِتَابَ اللهِ وَعِتْرَتِي أَهْلَ بَيْتِي
english_en: I am leaving among you two weighty things: the Book of Allah and my Ahlul Bayt. They will never separate until they meet me at the Pond of Kawthar.

arabic_REF: الْعِلْمُ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْمَالِ، الْعِلْمُ يَحْرُسُكَ وَأَنْتَ تَحْرُسُ الْمَالَ
english_en: Knowledge is better than wealth. Knowledge guards you, while you must guard wealth. Wealth decreases with spending, but knowledge only grows.

arabic_REF: لَمْ أَخْرُجْ أَشِراً وَلا بَطِراً، وَإِنَّمَا خَرَجْتُ لِطَلَبِ الإِصْلاحِ فِي أُمَّةِ جَدِّي
english_en: I did not rise out of arrogance or corruption. I rose only to seek reform in the nation of my grandfather, the Prophet (SAW).

arabic_REF: أَفْضَلُ الأَعْمَالِ إِدْخَالُ السُّرُورِ عَلَى قَلْبِ الْمُؤْمِنِ
english_en: The best of deeds is to bring joy to the heart of a believer — to satisfy his hunger, relieve his worry, or pay off his debt.

arabic_REF: اعْبُدِ اللهَ كَأَنَّكَ تَرَاهُ، فَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُنْ تَرَاهُ فَإِنَّهُ يَرَاكَ
english_en: Worship Allah as though you see Him; even if you cannot see Him, He surely sees you.

arabic_REF: الصَّبْرُ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ بِمَنْزِلَةِ الرَّأْسِ مِنَ الْجَسَدِ
english_en: Patience is to faith what the head is to the body. A body without a head perishes, and so does faith without patience.

arabic_REF: الإِيمَانُ إِقْرَارٌ بِالْقَلْبِ وَإِقْرَارٌ بِاللِّسَانِ وَعَمَلٌ بِالأَرْكَانِ
english_en: Faith is acknowledgment with the heart, confession with the tongue, and action with the limbs.

arabic_REF: التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللهِ ثَمَنٌ لِكُلِّ غَالٍ وَسُلَّمٌ إِلَى كُلِّ عَالٍ
english_en: Reliance on Allah is the price of every precious thing and the ladder to every elevated station.

arabic_REF: الدُّنْيَا سُوقٌ رَبِحَ فِيهَا قَوْمٌ وَخَسِرَ آخَرُونَ
english_en: The world is a marketplace: some people profit from it, while others incur loss.

arabic_REF: التَّقْوَى شَرَفٌ وَالْعِلْمُ كَنْزٌ وَالصَّمْتُ نُورٌ
english_en: Piety is an honor, knowledge is a treasure, silence is a light, and the peak of worship is modesty and contentment.

arabic_REF: إِنَّا غَيْرُ مُهْمِلِينَ لِمُرَاعَاتِكُمْ وَلا نَاسِينَ لِذِكْرِكُمْ
english_en: We are not neglectful of your affairs, nor forgetful of your remembrance. Were it not for that, hardships would descend upon you.

arabic_REF: خَيْرُكُمْ خَيْرُكُمْ لأَهْلِهِ
english_en: The best of you is the best among his family.

arabic_REF: الْمَرْءُ مَخْبُوءٌ تَحْتَ لِسَانِهِ
english_en: A person is hidden beneath his tongue. Speak, and you will be known.

arabic_REF: الْمُصِيبَةُ لِلصَّابِرِ وَاحِدَةٌ وَلِلْجَازِعِ اثْنَتَانِ
english_en: A calamity for the patient person is one; but for the impatient, it is two — the calamity itself and the loss of patience.

arabic_REF: حَقُّ أُمِّكَ أَنْ تَعْلَمَ أَنَّهَا حَمَلَتْكَ حَيْثُ لا يَحْمِلُ أَحَدٌ أَحَداً
english_en: The right of your mother upon you is that you know: she carried you as no one carries another, and nourished you from the fruit of her heart.

arabic_REF: لا خَيْرَ فِي قِرَاءَةٍ لَيْسَ فِيهَا تَدَبُّرٌ
english_en: There is no good in recitation without reflection and understanding of what is being recited.

arabic_REF: احْفَظْ لِسَانَكَ كَمَا تَحْفَظُ ذَهَبَكَ وَفِضَّتَكَ
english_en: Guard your tongue as you guard your gold and silver, for many have been destroyed by a word carelessly spoken.

arabic_REF: أَعْقَلُ النَّاسِ أَحْسَنُهُمْ مُدَارَاةً لِلنَّاسِ
english_en: The most intelligent of people is the one who deals with others most wisely and with the most patience.

arabic_REF: مَنْ حَسُنَ خُلُقُهُ كَمَلَ نِصْفُ عَقْلِهِ
english_en: One who has a good character has completed half of his intellect.

arabic_REF: ثَلاثٌ يُبَلِّغْنَ بِالْعَبْدِ رِضَا اللهِ: كَثْرَةُ الاسْتِغْفَارِ وَلِينُ الجَانِبِ وَكَثْرَةُ الصَّدَقَةِ
english_en: Three things bring the servant to the pleasure of Allah: abundant seeking of forgiveness, gentleness in dealings, and frequent charity.

arabic_REF: لا تَسْتَعِنْ بِمَنْ ظَلَمَ نَفْسَهُ
english_en: Do not seek the aid of one who has wronged himself — for one who cannot be just to himself cannot be just to others.

arabic_REF: مِنْ عَلامَاتِ الْفَقِيهِ: الْحِلْمُ وَالْعِلْمُ وَالصَّمْتُ
english_en: Among the signs of true understanding are: forbearance, love of knowledge, and deliberate silence.

arabic_REF: جَعَلَ اللهُ الإِيمَانَ تَطْهِيراً مِنَ الشِّرْكِ وَالصَّلاةَ تَنْزِيهاً عَنِ الكِبْرِ
english_en: Allah has made faith a purification from polytheism, prayer a purification from pride, and zakat a purification of the soul and wealth.

arabic_REF: أَشَدُّكُمْ مَنْ غَلَبَ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ
english_en: The strongest among you is the one who controls himself in anger.

arabic_REF: دَوَاءُ الْجَهْلِ السُّؤَالُ
english_en: The cure for ignorance is to ask. Do not be too proud to seek knowledge from those who have it.

arabic_REF: الْمُؤْمِنُ أَخُو الْمُؤْمِنِ كَالْجَسَدِ الْوَاحِدِ
english_en: The believer is the brother of the believer, like a single body — if one part suffers, all other parts respond with sleeplessness and fever.

arabic_REF: صِلْ مَنْ قَطَعَكَ وَأَعْطِ مَنْ حَرَمَكَ وَاعْفُ عَمَّنْ ظَلَمَكَ
english_en: Maintain ties with those who sever theirs; give to those who deprive you; and forgive those who wrong you.

arabic_REF: التَّوْبَةُ النَّدَمُ بِالْقَلْبِ وَالاسْتِغْفَارُ بِاللِّسَانِ وَالتَّرْكُ بِالْجَوَارِحِ
english_en: True repentance is remorse in the heart, seeking forgiveness with the tongue, and abstaining from sin with the limbs.

arabic_REF: لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يُحَاسِبْ نَفْسَهُ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ
english_en: He is not of us who does not hold himself to account every single day — examining his deeds, intentions, and heart.

arabic_REF: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ
english_en: The seeking of knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim — man and woman alike.

arabic_REF: قِيمَةُ كُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا يُحْسِنُهُ
english_en: The worth of every person lies in what he does well. Invest in what you master and offer it to the world.

arabic_REF: كُنْ لِلظَّالِمِ خَصْماً وَلِلْمَظْلُومِ عَوْناً
english_en: Be an opponent to the oppressor and a helper to the oppressed — regardless of who they are.

arabic_REF: إِنَّ أَحَبَّكُمْ إِلَى اللهِ أَحْسَنُكُمْ أَخْلاقاً
english_en: The most beloved of you to Allah is the one with the finest character — gentle in speech, patient in trials, and generous in giving.

arabic_REF: لا تَكُنْ مِمَّنْ يَرْجُو الآخِرَةَ بِغَيْرِ عَمَلٍ
english_en: Do not be among those who hope for the next life without working for it, or who delay repentance because of long hopes.

arabic_REF: أَكْرِمُوا أَوْلادَكُمْ وَأَحْسِنُوا آدَابَهُمْ
english_en: Honor your children and cultivate their character well, for they are a trust from Allah placed in your hands.

arabic_REF: كَفَى بِالنَّفْسِ عِلْماً أَنْ تَعْرِفَ عُيُوبَهَا
english_en: It is sufficient self-knowledge to recognize one's own faults — before pointing to the faults of others.
